compiled_state.title: GREEN: Update all DESIGN_NOTES.md references to .claude/design-notes.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Update all 23+ references to DESIGN_NOTES.md across the codebase to point to .claude/design-notes.md. Update workflow-config-schema.json default.

### Approach:
1. grep -rn 'DESIGN_NOTES.md' to find all references
2. For each file, update the path (skip files that already use .claude/design-notes.md)
3. Update workflow-config-schema.json design_notes_path default
4. Verify no old references remain

## File Impact
- 23+ files across plugins/dso/ (modify)
- workflow-config-schema.json (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No references to bare DESIGN_NOTES.md remain
  Verify: ! grep -rn 'DESIGN_NOTES\.md' plugins/dso/ --include='*.md' --include='*.sh' --include='*.json' --include='*.yaml' | grep -v '.claude/design-notes.md' | grep -v '.test-index' | head -1
- [ ] bash tests/scripts/test-design-notes-migration.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-design-notes-migration.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: RED tests confirmed. test_no_old_design_notes_refs FAILS (64 refs found, expected 0). test_schema_default_updated FAILS (default is DESIGN_NOTES.md, expected .claude/design-notes.md). test_validate_config_accepts_new_path passes. Proceeding with replacements.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
